headline: Hair Transplant in Chennai -- AIIMS-Trained Surgeon
subheadline: Advanced FUE hair transplant with honest candidacy evaluation. No overselling graft counts you don't need.
metaDescription: Hair transplant in KK Nagar, Chennai by an AIIMS-trained dermatosurgeon. FUE technique, honest candidacy evaluation. Book a consultation.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Conservative Graft Planning
whyPatientsChoose.description: We plan grafts around your actual donor supply, not a number that sounds impressive -- protecting your future options.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Honest Candidacy Evaluation
whyPatientsChoose.description: If medical therapy should come before surgery in your case, we'll say so directly, rather than proceeding to a sale.

educationalInsight.title: Is a Hair Transplant Right for You Right Now?
educationalInsight.body: Not every patient with hair loss benefits from immediate surgery. Donor density, pattern stability, and your realistic goals all factor into whether a transplant makes sense now, or whether medical therapy should come first.

steps: Assessment of hair loss pattern and stability
Honest graft estimate and candidacy discussion

branches.outcome: Proceed to surgical planning and hairline design
Medical therapy recommended first to stabilize before considering surgery

doctorsPerspectiveStructured.patientConcern: I don't want to end up needing a second surgery later because too much was taken the first time.
doctorsPerspectiveStructured.response: That's exactly why we plan conservatively around your actual donor supply rather than a target graft count. Protecting your future options matters more to us than a bigger number on day one.

processSteps.title: Consultation
processSteps.description: Scalp examination, donor assessment, and an honest conversation about candidacy.

processSteps.title: Planning
processSteps.description: Hairline design and graft planning specific to your face and donor supply.

processSteps.title: Procedure
processSteps.description: FUE performed under local anaesthesia, typically completed in one session.

processSteps.title: Recovery & Follow-Up
processSteps.description: Post-operative care guidance and scheduled follow-up to track growth over the following months.

landingFaqs.question: Will I need a second session later?
landingFaqs.answer: It depends on how your hair loss progresses after surgery. Conservative donor planning at your first session helps keep this option open if you ever need it.

landingFaqs.question: How soon can I book if I'm ready to proceed?
landingFaqs.answer: We can typically schedule your evaluation within the week -- call or book online to see available slots.

landingFaqs.question: Is this really from an AIIMS-trained surgeon, not a technician?
landingFaqs.answer: Yes -- Dr. Karthik L, Consultant Dermatologist and Dermatosurgeon (MD, AIIMS New Delhi), personally performs evaluations and procedures.

learnMoreLink.text: Learn more about the FUE procedure, recovery, and results timeline
